source: Illinois Commerce Commission (The Liberty Consulting Group audit)
source_note: Illinois Commerce Commission — 'Baseline Distribution Grid Assessment of Commonwealth Edison Company, Pursuant to Section 16-105.10 of the Illinois Public Utilities Act, Final Report', prepared for the ICC by The Liberty Consulting Group (April 12, 2022, 131 pp), ICC Docket 21-0737 under the Climate and Equitable Jobs Act (CEJA).
